vibe: Control Room, Precise, Professional, Developer-First, Brutalist, Technical

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-white
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-white

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing for marketing pages (p-16 to p-32). Dense, space-efficient 'Control Room' layout for the Inference Studio (p-4 to p-6).

grid_modes.inference_studio: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-px bg-zinc-800 (1px borders). Sidebar task/model selector col-span-3, Main Canvas area col-span-9. Use h-[calc(100vh-64px)] for the studio to prevent scrolling.
grid_modes.landing_page: Tetris bento grid, gap-8, asymmetric spans. Grid items must be direct children.
grid_modes.dataset_manager: Dense table layout or responsive grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 for image thumbnails, gap-4.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Solid black background with a hard 1px bottom border (border-zinc-800). Z-index 50. Sticky.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_panels: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Use border-collapse style layouts, 1px borders, NO soft shadows. Radius max 4px (rounded-sm) or 0px (rounded-none).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.glassmorphism: Avoid in the main studio to prevent visual distraction from CV tasks. Can use 'Crystal Glass' strictly for landing page sticky nav (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard background shifts (hover:bg-white hover:text-black) or sharp border highlights (hover:border-white). No slow generic fades.
motion_and_interactions.cv_canvas: Bounding boxes should have 2px solid borders in cv_accents colors and subtle translucent fill (10% opacity). Keypoints for pose should be solid circles.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Instant or very fast (0.15s) ease-out. It's a professional tool; speed matters.

components.buttons: Brutalist. rounded-sm or rounded-none. Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-white hover:border-white.
components.cards: Flat, sharp borders (border-zinc-800), bg-zinc-950/50. No shadow.
components.inputs: Shadcn input with sharp borders, focus ring is 1px solid white (focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-white focus-visible:ring-offset-0).
components.tables: Dense. text-sm. Hover on row should be bg-zinc-900.
components.tabs: Override shadcn default h-9 to h-auto. Active tab should have a sharp bottom border (border-b-2 border-white) or solid white background.

images.description: B&W circuit board. Use as a low-opacity, grayscale background for the Landing Page Hero section or API Docs header.
Futuristic autonomous car in dark setting. Use as a sample image/video poster in the Inference Studio demo area or landing page feature.
Programmer coding screen. Use for the 'Model Hub' or 'API Docs' bento card on the landing page.

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor icons for a technical, crisp look. Weight should be 'regular' or 'bold'. E.g., Use WebCam, Image, Video, BoundingBox, Activity, ChartBar, Gear.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a professional CV tool, not a generic SaaS. Do not use generic soft shadows, gradients, or rounded corners > 4px.

The primary layout for the Inference Studio must use the 'Control Room' grid: dense, fully utilizing screen space. Use `h-[calc(100vh-64px)]` for the main studio to prevent page scrolling, utilizing internal scrolling only for sidebars.
All real-time inference stats (FPS, Latency, Memory) MUST be displayed using JetBrains Mono (font-mono) with tabular-nums.
Bounding boxes and segmentation masks rendered on the HTML canvas must use the 'cv_accents' colors for high contrast against camera/video streams.
Implement the dark theme strictly by using Tailwind dark mode classes or forcing a dark background on body.
Customize Shadcn components heavily: strip out ring-offset, soft shadows, and rounding. Replace with sharp 1px borders.
Data structure for CV tasks should use distinct visual identifiers. E.g., a green icon for detection, blue for segmentation, etc.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, task selectors, model toggles, upload zones, inference canvas) MUST include 'data-testid' attributes in kebab-case.
